files: outlines/types/__init__.py
region: end-of-file appended block after isbn
code: # US Social Security Number format: XXX-XX-XXXX
ssn = Regex(r"\d{3}-\d{2}-\d{4}")

# SHA-256 hash: 64 hexadecimal characters (0-9, a-f, A-F)
hash_sha256 = Regex(r"[a-fA-F0-9]{64}")
note: Since both our new types append at EOF right after isbn, let's agree on one combined tail block (ssn then hash_sha256) so both patches are byte-identical there. Adjust ssn regex if yours differs, then send AGREE.
